data.title: Precision Biologics to Reveal New AML Target for CAR-NK at American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting on April 19th, 2026
data.description: Bethesda-based Precision Biologics, Inc. has revealed a fresh target for CAR-NK therapy in Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML). The company will showcase data focusing on various human AML subtypes that exhibit truncated core 1 O-glycans in a poster at the upcoming American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) annual meeting. This development signals a significant advancement in the fight against AML and underscores the company's dedication to innovation in cancer treatment. The specific numbers or details regarding the dataset were not disclosed.

data.title: Arintra Achieves HITRUST e1 Certification, Demonstrating Commitment to Cybersecurity and Information Protection
data.description: In San Francisco, Arintra, a prominent GenAI-native autonomous medical coding platform for healthcare entities, revealed today that its platform has achieved certified status from HITRUST for cybersecurity and information safeguarding. The HITRUST e1 Certification showcases that Arintra has fulfilled the set criteria by a top cybersecurity assurance entity, ensuring the presence of robust measures to safeguard sensitive information and proficiently handle risks. data.title: Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Holders Move Over $300M From Robinhood: What Do They Know?
data.description: In the past month, Dogecoin (DOGE) and Shiba Inu (SHIB) have experienced price increases of 7% and 6% respectively amid a positive shift in market sentiment. Large holders of both cryptocurrencies have been moving tokens off exchanges, as indicated by significant transfers noted by Whale Alert data. The movements from Robinhood to private wallets suggest a decrease in immediate selling pressure. Dogecoin holders transferred more than 2.56 billion DOGE (around $245 million) in five transactions, marking one of the largest single-day liquidity withdrawals for the asset. Similarly, Shiba Inu holders moved over 16 trillion SHIB tokens.

data.title: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Bank of New York Mellon Following Upbeat Q1 Earnings
data.description: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (NYSE: BK) posted impressive first-quarter 2026 results on Thursday, exceeding expectations. Diluted EPS surged 42% year over year to $2.24 from $1.58, with adjusted EPS at $2.25, surpassing estimates of $1.93. Total revenue hit a record $5.409 billion, marking a 13% increase, surpassing estimates of $5.180 billion. CEO Robin Vince noted the company's strong performance with record revenue and a 13% year-over-year growth. Bank of New York Mellon shares closed at $134.84, up by 0.1% on Thursday. For in-depth details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Blink Charging Teams with Brookhaven Market and Heartland Charging Services to Celebrate Earth Day in Darien
data.description: In celebration of Earth Day on April 22, 2026, Blink is providing a special promotion at their Darien location in Brookhaven Market. Customers can enjoy a generous 50% discount on fast charging services at this specific site. Take advantage of this Earth Day offer to save money while supporting sustainable transportation options.

data.title: Carpenter Technology Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Philadelphia on April 17, 2026, Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE: CRS) disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common stock share. The payment is set to be distributed on June 4, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of April 28, 2026.

data.title: Psyence BioMed Welcomes U.S. Executive Action to Advance Research into Ibogaine
data.description: A company is showcasing its worldwide leadership in Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) for ibogaine production, emphasizing its dedication to responsibly sourced supply. The company has notably established itself as a frontrunner in producing ibogaine using GMP standards, ensuring high-quality standards in manufacturing. Additionally, the company places significant importance on ensuring that its ibogaine supply chain is sourced ethically, demonstrating a commitment to sustainability and fair trade practices. This underscores the company's dedication to producing quality products while maintaining an ethical approach to sourcing materials.

data.description: In San Francisco on April 17, 2026, it was announced that a securities class action lawsuit was initiated against ODDITY Tech. Ltd. (NASDAQ: ODD). data.title: XPENG to Showcase "Physical AI" Ecosystem at Beijing Auto Show, Outlining Global Vision for Smart Mobility
data.description: On April 24, 2026, in Beijing, XPENG is set to introduce its latest "Physical AI" ecosystem at the Beijing Auto Show. This unveiling marks a significant shift for the company, signaling its evolution from a smart EV producer to a prominent player in the realm of physical AI technology. The showcase will highlight XPENG's advancements towards becoming a worldwide authority in this field. Visitors to the event can expect a detailed presentation demonstrating the company's commitment to innovation and cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Qualcomm Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) based in San Diego, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.92 per common share. The payment is scheduled for June 25, 2026, to shareholders on record as of June 4, 2026. Qualcomm is a technology company focused on driving innovation in intelligent computing globally. With 40 years of experience, Qualcomm aims to address significant challenges by providing a wide range of cutting-edge solutions.

data.title: Bruker Spatial Biology Showcases High Fidelity Spatial Data and Integrated Multi-platform Workflows for Unprecedented Multiomic Insights at AACR 2026
data.description: In San Diego, Bruker Corporation (BRKR) revealed the latest developments from Bruker Spatial Biology set to be presented at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting. The event will feature the unveiling of new cross-platform workflows aimed at enhancing understanding of oncology biology and expediting translational research. Bruker Spatial Biology's innovative spatial platforms are intended to work in conjunction to provide enhanced insights. The updates will be showcased at AACR 2026, demonstrating the company's commitment to advancing cancer research.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Concert Golf Partners/
data.description: Concert Golf Partners' acquisition of The Club at New Seabury has been ranked as the top deal of the year by Golf Inc. Magazine. The news release was issued on 17-Apr-2026 by Concert Golf Partners through PR Newswire. The purchase of The Club at New Seabury was highlighted as the number one deal in the industry. This acquisition marks a significant achievement for Concert Golf Partners, showcasing their successful transaction. The recognition from Golf Inc. Magazine further solidifies the importance and impact of this purchase in the golf industry.

data.title: Viz.ai Wins Gold Edison Award™ for Advancing AI-Driven Clinical Workflows to Improve Hemorrhage Care
data.description: In San Francisco, Viz.ai, a prominent player in AI-driven disease detection and care coordination, revealed their triumph at the 2026 Gold Edison Award for their Viz Hemorrhage solution. This accolade signifies their fourth Edison Award win and emphasizes Viz.ai's position as a pioneer in establishing the necessary framework that empowers artificial intelligence to function within healthcare institutions. The award, received in the Health, Medical & Biotech division, attests to Viz.ai's innovative approach in developing AI technologies.

data.title: U.S. Enterprises Accelerate Mainframe Modernization
data.description: Business advisory firm ISG reports that companies in the United States are updating their mainframe systems to align with current needs, placing emphasis on business operations and leveraging AI-based automation. This strategic move demonstrates a shift towards modernization and optimization for enterprises, with significant implications for enhancing efficiency and productivity.
